description: You are a process safety engineer completing a Fault Tree Analysis (FTA) for a chemical reactor thermal runaway incident. Expand the partially started diagram at '~/Diagrams/reactor_fta.drawio' to include all failure modes described in the incident investigation report at '~/Desktop/incident_investigation_report.txt', using the notation reference at '~/Desktop/fta_notation_reference.txt'. The expanded tree must include intermediate events (Rectangles) and basic events (Circles) for all branches using appropriate logic gates. Label every basic event with its specific failure probability from the report (e.g., 'P=2.1E-3') and color-code events by subsystem as specified in the report (Blue=Cooling, Orange=Control, Red=Shutdown). Export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/reactor_fta.pdf'.
